creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
itetcu      2007-08-14 11:40:35 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    science              Makefile 
  Added files:
    science/speedcrunch  Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  SpeedCrunch is a multiplatform desktop calculator for power users.
  It is designed to be enjoyed using keyboard. Result is shown in
  scrollable display, history of expressions is available with up
  and down arrow.
  
  Some other features:
  optional keypad, syntax highlight, matched parenthesis indicator,
  just-in-time calculation (show result even before you finish typing)
  and autocomplete for variables.
  
  WWW: http://speedcrunch.digitalfanatics.org/
  
  PR:             ports/114969
  Submitted by:   Yinghong.Liu <relaxbsd at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.121     +1 -0      ports/science/Makefile
  1.1       +71 -0     ports/science/speedcrunch/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/science/speedcrunch/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +11 -0     ports/science/speedcrunch/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +32 -0     ports/science/speedcrunch/pkg-plist (new)
